metadata.title: Starter Piece Library
metadata.description: Starter movement chassis, tag library, and sample pieces for a card-driven chess-variant tactics game.

coordinate_system.relative_forward_definition: Positive Y is always forward from the owning player's perspective.

movement_chassis.name: Pawn
movement_chassis.description: Moves forward one, captures forward diagonally one.

movement_chassis.name: Reverse Pawn
movement_chassis.description: Moves one step toward home, captures diagonally toward home.

movement_chassis.name: Checker Man
movement_chassis.description: Moves one diagonal forward, captures by forward jump.

movement_chassis.name: Checker King
movement_chassis.description: Moves one diagonal any direction, captures by diagonal jump.

movement_chassis.name: Nightrider
movement_chassis.description: Repeats knight steps in the same direction.

movement_chassis.name: Cannon
movement_chassis.description: Moves like a rook. Captures like a rook but requires exactly one screen.

movement_chassis.name: Grasshopper
movement_chassis.description: Moves along queen lines, must hop one hurdle, lands immediately beyond it.

movement_chassis.name: Xiangqi Horse
movement_chassis.description: Knight-like mover blocked by an adjacent orthogonal leg square.

movement_chassis.name: Xiangqi Elephant
movement_chassis.description: A blocked (2,2) mover that often cannot cross the center line.

movement_chassis.name: Gold General
movement_chassis.description: One step forward, forward diagonals, sideways, and straight back.

movement_chassis.name: Silver General
movement_chassis.description: One step forward, forward diagonals, and backward diagonals.

movement_chassis.name: Rifleman Line
movement_chassis.description: Moves one step orthogonally. Captures at line-of-sight range 2-4 without movement.

movement_chassis.name: Musketeer Line
movement_chassis.description: Moves one step orthogonally. Captures at exact line-of-sight range 2 without movement.

tags.name: Safe Deploy
tags.description: Cannot be deployed into an enemy-threatened square.

tags.name: Threat Override
tags.description: May be deployed into enemy-threatened squares.

tags.name: Backline Only
tags.description: Must deploy in the owner's backline zone.

tags.name: Home Half Only
tags.description: Must deploy in the owner's half of the board.

tags.name: Enemy Half Only
tags.description: Must deploy in the enemy half of the board.

tags.name: Adjacent Ally Deploy
tags.description: Must deploy adjacent to an allied piece.

tags.name: Haste
tags.description: May move and capture on the deploy turn.

tags.name: Move Only on Deploy
tags.description: May act on the deploy turn, but may not capture.

tags.name: Delayed Wake 1
tags.description: Cannot act until one full round has passed.

tags.name: Exhaust After Capture
tags.description: Becomes exhausted after making a capture.

tags.name: Ranged Capture (No Advance)
tags.description: Captures without moving into the target square.

tags.name: Shield 1
tags.description: Ignore the first successful capture against this piece.

tags.name: Shield 2
tags.description: Ignore the first two successful captures against this piece.

tags.name: Armor vs Ranged
tags.description: Reduces or negates ranged capture effects.

tags.name: Phased on Deploy
tags.description: Cannot be targeted until the start of the owner's next turn.

tags.name: Fragile
tags.description: Falls easily; useful for high-risk aggressive units.

tags.name: Range Cap 3
tags.description: Caps rider-style movement and capture range to 3.

tags.name: Range Cap 4
tags.description: Caps rider-style movement and capture range to 4.

tags.name: Gain Shield If Idle
tags.description: If this piece spends a round idle, it gains 1 shield.

tags.name: Bodyguard Adjacent
tags.description: Redirects lethal captures from adjacent allies to this piece.

tags.name: Expires After 3 Rounds
tags.description: This piece is temporary and expires after 3 rounds in play.

tags.name: Bonus on Capture +1
tags.description: Scores 1 extra point whenever this piece captures.

tags.name: Bounty on Death +2
tags.description: Worth 2 extra points when destroyed.

tags.name: Pierce 1
tags.description: Removes one defense layer before capture resolution.

tags.name: Break 1
tags.description: On shielded targets, strips one defense layer without forcing a kill.

tags.name: Push On Non-Lethal 1
tags.description: On non-lethal contact, pushes the defender 1 tile away if destination is open.

tags.name: Pull On Non-Lethal 1
tags.description: On non-lethal contact, pulls the defender 1 tile toward the attacker if destination is open.

tags.name: Thrust
tags.description: After a lethal contact capture, performs one forward adjacent follow-up capture check.

tags.name: Cleave
tags.description: After a lethal contact capture, performs left and right adjacent follow-up capture checks.

tags.name: Avatar Core Unit
tags.description: Marks this piece as the run-identity avatar unit.

tags.name: Deploy Cost +1
tags.description: Costs 1 additional deploy energy.

tags.name: Move Cost +1
tags.description: Costs 1 additional move energy.

tags.name: Elite Action Tax
tags.description: Consumes one extra action slot when used.

tags.name: Ambush Deploy
tags.description: May deploy into threatened squares and may act immediately, but not capture on deploy.

pieces.name: Avatar Core
pieces.description: Run-persistent leader unit used for avatar progression and hero-card affinity.

pieces.name: Fortress Rook
pieces.description: A slow, durable lane anchor.

pieces.name: Vanguard Knight
pieces.description: Aggressive early-game diver that can enter hot squares.

pieces.name: Cavalry Officers
pieces.description: Shield-piercing cavalry strike team for cracking defended lanes.

pieces.name: Maul Guard
pieces.description: Compact breaker unit that strips layered defenses before allies finish.

pieces.name: Hook Lancer
pieces.description: Break-first lancer that shoves shielded defenders out of lane on non-lethal contact.

pieces.name: Chain Warden
pieces.description: Defensive controller that drags shielded attackers forward on non-lethal contact.

pieces.name: Lancer
pieces.description: Cavalry striker that follows through with a forward hit after lethal contact captures.

pieces.name: Halberdier
pieces.description: Frontline polearm unit with forward and side follow-up pressure on lethal contact captures.

pieces.name: Rifleman
pieces.description: Reliable lane marksman with line-of-sight ranged capture at medium distance.

pieces.name: Musketeer
pieces.description: Heavy shot specialist with short-ranged line-of-sight fire and shield break pressure.

pieces.name: Formation Captain
pieces.description: Line support officer that must deploy beside allies and stabilize local fronts.

pieces.name: Honor Guard
pieces.description: Protective escort that intercepts lethal strikes aimed at adjacent allies at personal risk.

pieces.name: Patrol Rook
pieces.description: Mid-range lane controller with a capped movement and capture reach.

pieces.name: Field Mason
pieces.description: Deploys a short-lived forward barricade to shape tempo and routes.

pieces.name: Bastion Foreman
pieces.description: Heavy lane foreman that drops stronger temporary structures on deploy.

pieces.name: Siege Cannon
pieces.description: Powerful ranged threat that needs setup time.

pieces.name: Silver Scout
pieces.description: Mobile skirmisher with efficient point pressure.

pieces.name: Ghost Camel
pieces.description: A strange long leaper that appears briefly and hits hard.

pieces.name: Shadow Spy
pieces.description: Infiltrator that deploys in enemy territory and retreats with reverse-pawn movement.

pieces.name: Gate Guard
pieces.description: Compact defensive unit for holding lanes and protecting deploy zones.

pieces.name: Hopper Assassin
pieces.description: A grasshopper-based ambusher that depends on screens and chaos.

pieces.name: Elephant Wall
pieces.description: A chunky zone-limited blocker with high staying power.

pieces.name: Archon Chancellor
pieces.description: A premium compound threat with real presence and real downside.

hero_cards.name: Guard Order
hero_cards.description: Grant a protective shield to a friendly unit for the battle.

hero_cards.name: Lance Order
hero_cards.description: Grant forward follow-up pressure to a friendly unit for the battle.

rulesets.name: Default Light Energy
rulesets.description: Recommended starting ruleset: deploy one piece and move one piece each turn, with elite cards able to consume extra actions.
